Appearance

DvAI-EdgeLocal AI Orchestration

Unified LLM inference for Web, Capacitor, and Electron with zero cloud costs.

Get Started
View on GitHub

🚀 Multi-Backend

Seamlessly switch between WebLLM (WebGPU), Transformers.js, and Native LLMs via `llama-cpp-capacitor`.

🛡️ Auto-Recovery

Built-in robustness for WebLLM with automatic recovery from blank outputs and timeouts.

📱 Native Support

High-performance GGUF model support on iOS and Android via a native Capacitor plugin.

⚛️ First-class React

Easy-to-use Hooks and Providers for React, with full TypeScript support and auto-initialization.

🍦 Vanilla JS Support

Works in any environment (Vanilla JS, Vue, Svelte, Angular) via a lightweight, framework-agnostic wrapper.

🤖 Agent SDK Ready

Fully compatible with LangChain, Vercel AI SDK, and more via a local OpenAI-compatible API interface.

🎨 Multi-Modal

Support for Text, Image, Audio, and Video tasks via Transformers.js (Multi-modality coming soon for all backends).

📦 Hybrid Model Handling

Automatic backend selection based on the environment (Web, Mobile, or Electron).

🔒 100% Local & Private

Zero API costs, zero server maintenance, and maximum user privacy. Your data never leaves the device.

Released under Custom License.
